title: [SG Seller]Dual Mode RC Flying Car Land Air Mode Remote Control LED Light Drift Aircraft Kids Outdoor RC Toy
detail_text: 🌈SG SELLER, SG STOCK 🌈 🎀DELIVERY IN 1-3 DAYS🎀 🧸ABOUT PRODUCT🧸 Material: Plastic Product Description This 2-in-1 land-air RC flying race car is an exciting outdoor toy gift for Singapore kids and boys. It supports two convertible modes: quadcopter flying mode and ground drift racing mode, you can switch between flight and land driving with simple remote control operation to enjoy double fun in one vehicle.Equipped with eye-catching gradient LED lights around all four propeller protective frames, it delivers stunning glowing visual effects especially during night play. Full surround soft guard covers the propellers compley to avoid finger injury and reduce crash damage.Made of flexible impact-resistant ABS plastic, the streamlined F1 racing body is durable against drops and bumps. The user-friendly remote controller is easy for beginners and children to master, supporting smooth drifting, sharp turns, ascending and descending. Perfect for indoor floor play and outdoor park flight, ideal birthday and holiday present for kids to improve hand-eye coordination. 🍭Note🍭 🎀Please allow 1-2cm errors due to manual measurement. 🍭Due to the difference between different monitors,thepictures may not reflect the actual color of the item.
detail_html:
🌈SG SELLER, SG STOCK 🌈



🎀DELIVERY IN 1-3 DAYS🎀



🧸ABOUT PRODUCT🧸



Material: Plastic



Product Description



This 2-in-1 land-air RC flying race car is an exciting outdoor toy gift for Singapore kids and boys. It supports two convertible modes: quadcopter flying mode and ground drift racing mode, you can switch between flight and land driving with simple remote control operation to enjoy double fun in one vehicle.Equipped with eye-catching gradient LED lights around all four propeller protective frames, it delivers stunning glowing visual effects especially during night play. Full surround soft guard covers the propellers compley to avoid finger injury and reduce crash damage.Made of flexible impact-resistant ABS plastic, the streamlined F1 racing body is durable against drops and bumps. The user-friendly remote controller is easy for beginners and children to master, supporting smooth drifting, sharp turns, ascending and descending. Perfect for indoor floor play and outdoor park flight, ideal birthday and holiday present for kids to improve hand-eye coordination.



🍭Note🍭



🎀Please allow 1-2cm errors due to manual measurement.



🍭Due to the difference between different monitors,thepictures may not reflect the actual color of the item.

title: Soft Gel Boomerang Flying Toy
detail_text: Three-Leaf Design Its unique three-leaf design allows for better aerodynamics and increased range, making it perfect for outdoor sports. Professional Design The Optic Discus is designed for professional use, ensuring durability and longevity for outdoor play. Outdoor Toy Ideal for outdoor play, this toy encourages children to get active and enjoy the great outdoors. Ultraman Theme Featuring the popular Ultraman theme, this toy appeals to children's love for superheroes, enhancing their play experience. Easy to Use This toy is easy to use, making it suitable for children of all ages, promoting physical activity and fun.

title: NUBILUBI | Soothing Tracking Training Flying Bird Toy
detail_text: Educational Value Apart from entertainment, this toy also serves an educational purpose by helping babies develop their motor skills. Interactive Design The interactive design of the toy encourages babies to follow its movement, enhancing their visual tracking skills. Portable and Lightweight Its lightweight design makes it easy to carry around, ensuring your baby can enjoy the toy wherever you go. Electric Flying Bird Toy This toy features an electric flying bird that soothes babies to sleep, making it a perfect tool for bedtime routines. Safety Material Made from safe and non-toxic materials, this toy is completely safe for your baby to play with.
detail_html:
Educational Value



Apart from entertainment, this toy also serves an educational purpose by helping babies develop their motor skills.






Interactive Design



The interactive design of the toy encourages babies to follow its movement, enhancing their visual tracking skills.






Portable and Lightweight



Its lightweight design makes it easy to carry around, ensuring your baby can enjoy the toy wherever you go.






Electric Flying Bird Toy



This toy features an electric flying bird that soothes babies to sleep, making it a perfect tool for bedtime routines.






Safety Material



Made from safe and non-toxic materials, this toy is completely safe for your baby to play with.

detail_text: Advantages: Easy for beginners, simpler flight. Auto altitude hold, stable hovering. One-click circle flight, performs aerial stunts. Smart obstacle avoidance, reduces collision risk. Upgraded gravity sensing remote control, dual mode switching. High-strength EPP material, drop-resistant and impact-resistant. Note： Purchase Includes Instruction Manual. The remote control requires two AAA batteries, and the drone uses a rechargeable battery module. Before use, please fully charge the battery to ensure a better experience. The flight time is 8 minutes. If not in use, please remove the battery to prevent damage. Please fly in an open area. This product is suitable for children aged six and above. Infants and toddlers should play under adult supervision. This product can last for about 8 minutes when fully charged This product contains small parts. To prevent choking, please play under adult supervision. The product dimensions are manually measured, and a deviation of +/- 1.5 cm is considered normal. Due to factors such as shooting light, ambient lighting, smartphone, displays, and resolution, slight color differences may exist in the product, which are considered normal phenomena. Consists of: drone*1, remote control*1, rechargeable battery*1, spare propellers*4, USB charging cable*1, user manual*1

title: Whirlpool Decompression Suspended Aircraft Fingertip Toy Flying Gyro Whirlpool Fly Orb Pro Flying Spinner Mini Drone Flying
detail_text: First generation：Top Edition Luxury Gyroscope Movement Upgrade+Charing Second generation：Deluxe Edition+Charging+Remote Control The Madic Drone is the toy of the year! It features an aerodynamic enclosed orb design allowing it to effortlessly glide through air leading to an extremely fun and addicting experience. Toss it up and watch it fly, float, glide, and climb before hovering back to your hand like magic! CALL IT WHATEVER YOU WANT “Rasengan”, “The Force”, “Magic” – but no matter what – you can count on the motorzied Madic Drone to make its way back into your palm after each and every throw. Let it go and watch it fly, float, glide, and climbbefore elegantly returning to your hand like a boomerang! Physics in action! SAFE FOR CHILDREN Keep your loved ones entertainedand educatedfor hours! Madic Drone trains hand-eye coordination and makes for a fun workout – physically and mentally. EASY TO OPERATE When you throw it upwards 30 degree to get flying. It will spin around and return to you like a boomerang. Throw it downwards 30 degree to get flying. It will fly travels steady in a straight line. MAGIC HAND CONTROLLED DRONE The Madic Drone is a cool flying toy that can find its way back to youwith no remote. Different throwing angles and speeds, the flying ball drone can achieve different flight routes and skills, as well as different smooth flight modes and boomerang effects. PLAY ANY TIME & ANYWHERE You don’t need a big area or a lot of space to take off with this Madic Drone, kids can have great time playing together in all kinds of parties and activitiesas well as the whole family. Product Details： Size: 3.7" Weight: 92g Material: Copolymerized PP, Toxic free and safe Package: 1 ×The Madic Drone 1 × USB Power Cord 1 x Manual guide with original box.
detail_html:
First generation：Top Edition Luxury Gyroscope Movement Upgrade+Charing

Second generation：Deluxe Edition+Charging+Remote Control

The Madic Drone is the toy of the year! It features an aerodynamic enclosed orb design allowing it to effortlessly glide through air leading to an extremely fun and addicting experience. Toss it up and watch it fly, float, glide, and climb before hovering back to your hand like magic!

CALL IT WHATEVER YOU WANT

“Rasengan”, “The Force”, “Magic” – but no matter what – you can count on the motorzied Madic Drone to make its way back into your palm after each and every throw. Let it go and watch it fly, float, glide, and climbbefore elegantly returning to your hand like a boomerang! Physics in action!

SAFE FOR CHILDREN

Keep your loved ones entertainedand educatedfor hours! Madic Drone trains hand-eye coordination and makes for a fun workout – physically and mentally.

EASY TO OPERATE

When you throw it upwards 30 degree to get flying. It will spin around and return to you like a boomerang. Throw it downwards 30 degree to get flying. It will fly travels steady in a straight line.

MAGIC HAND CONTROLLED DRONE

The Madic Drone is a cool flying toy that can find its way back to youwith no remote. Different throwing angles and speeds, the flying ball drone can achieve different flight routes and skills, as well as different smooth flight modes and boomerang effects.

PLAY ANY TIME & ANYWHERE

You don’t need a big area or a lot of space to take off with this Madic Drone, kids can have great time playing together in all kinds of parties and activitiesas well as the whole family.

Product Details：

Size: 3.7"

Weight: 92g

Material: Copolymerized PP, Toxic free and safe

Package:

1 ×The Madic Drone

1 × USB Power Cord

1 x Manual guide with original box.

title: Flynova Pro UFO Flying Drone Toys Infrared Induction Controller Mini Spinner with 360° Rotating Spinning LED Lights Birthday Gifts for Kids Children Adults Christmas
detail_text: The motorized flying spinner that floats, glides, and climbs through the air at your command, then returns to your hand like a boomerang. It lets you light up any room with incredible acrobatic tricks and now with an optional magic controller, you’ll have even greater control as you flying higher, go further, and perform more dazzling stunts than ever. Safety tested for use with children, it’s the worry-free way to keep you and your loved ones entertained for hours. All while learning new skills, improving your hand-eye-coordination, and getting up off the couch and onto your feet. It’s the perfect cure for lockdown boredom and too much screentime. If you’ve got a backyard, a rec room, or even a kitchen, the toy will bring hours of fun and challenge to anyone you play with. Features: UPDATE FLYNOVA PRO – Flynova Pro’s secret power comes from the onboard gyroscopic motor with a smooth flight pattern and boomerang effect. Different throwing speeds and angles allow different flight paths, tricks and high-speed maneuvers. The UNIQUE ADDITION "MAGIC CONTRILLER" – Now with an optional magic controller, you’ll have even greater control like send your Flynova Pro UFO drone flying sky high - up to 49 feet then reel it back in for the catch using the controller’s magnet attraction system. SWRILING DARK NIGHT UFO – With three colorful lights, your Flynova Pro flying toys will look like a neon shooting star when you launch it across the sky. If you really want to get some attention, practice your tricks at night when your Flynova Pro can light up the dark. KID-SAFE AND QUALITY ASSURED – We put the Flynova Pro drones for kids though numerous rigorous tests to ensure it’s durable enough to take the hits. The material is surprisingly soft and light, so getting a bump from the Flynova Pro is like a pat on the shoulder. FlyNova Pro is the perfect present for your friends and family. Coolest Flying Toy and Perfect Gift – The FLYNOVA PRO's reimagined globe shape and more powerful motor mean one thing: more mind-blowing tricks than ever. Flex your skills with these advanced stunts and maneuvers that will push your creativity and test your accuracy - with or without the magic controller. Perfect for kids, teenagers, adults, Elderly. These mini flying drones make awesome travel toys, Christmas gifts, boys gifts, girls gifts and fun birthday party activities. Specifications: Size: 9.5 *9.5 *9.5cm Net weight: 27g Function: Air Suspension, Magic Controller, Sudden Acceleration, Magnets Adsorption Color: Red/Blue/Pink Aerodynamic Design: Spherical Design Package Included: 1 x Flying Spinner 1 x instructions 1 x USB cable 1 x Packing box
detail_html:
The motorized flying spinner that floats, glides, and climbs through the air at your command, then returns to your hand like a boomerang. It lets you light up any room with incredible acrobatic tricks and now with an optional magic controller, you’ll have even greater control as you flying higher, go further, and perform more dazzling stunts than ever. Safety tested for use with children, it’s the worry-free way to keep you and your loved ones entertained for hours. All while learning new skills, improving your hand-eye-coordination, and getting up off the couch and onto your feet. It’s the perfect cure for lockdown boredom and too much screentime. If you’ve got a backyard, a rec room, or even a kitchen, the toy will bring hours of fun and challenge to anyone you play with.

Features:

UPDATE FLYNOVA PRO – Flynova Pro’s secret power comes from the onboard gyroscopic motor with a smooth flight pattern and boomerang effect. Different throwing speeds and angles allow different flight paths, tricks and high-speed maneuvers.

The UNIQUE ADDITION "MAGIC CONTRILLER" – Now with an optional magic controller, you’ll have even greater control like send your Flynova Pro UFO drone flying sky high - up to 49 feet then reel it back in for the catch using the controller’s magnet attraction system.

SWRILING DARK NIGHT UFO – With three colorful lights, your Flynova Pro flying toys will look like a neon shooting star when you launch it across the sky. If you really want to get some attention, practice your tricks at night when your Flynova Pro can light up the dark.

KID-SAFE AND QUALITY ASSURED – We put the Flynova Pro drones for kids though numerous rigorous tests to ensure it’s durable enough to take the hits. The material is surprisingly soft and light, so getting a bump from the Flynova Pro is like a pat on the shoulder. FlyNova Pro is the perfect present for your friends and family.

Coolest Flying Toy and Perfect Gift – The FLYNOVA PRO's reimagined globe shape and more powerful motor mean one thing: more mind-blowing tricks than ever. Flex your skills with these advanced stunts and maneuvers that will push your creativity and test your accuracy - with or without the magic controller. Perfect for kids, teenagers, adults, Elderly. These mini flying drones make awesome travel toys, Christmas gifts, boys gifts, girls gifts and fun birthday party activities.

Specifications:

Size: 9.5 *9.5 *9.5cm

Net weight: 27g

Function: Air Suspension, Magic Controller, Sudden Acceleration, Magnets Adsorption

Color: Red/Blue/Pink

Aerodynamic Design: Spherical Design

Package Included:

1 x Flying Spinner

1 x instructions

1 x USB cable

1 x Packing box

SWRILING DARK NIGHT UFO – With three colorful lights, your Flynova Pro flying toys will look like a neon shooting star when you launch it across the sky. If you really want to get some attention, practice your tricks at night when your Flynova Pro can light up the dark.

KID-SAFE AND QUALITY ASSURED – We put the Flynova Pro drones for kids though numerous rigorous tests to ensure it’s durable enough to take the hits. The material is surprisingly soft and light, so getting a bump from the Flynova Pro is like a pat on the shoulder. FlyNova Pro is the perfect present for your friends and family.

Coolest Flying Toy and Perfect Gift – The FLYNOVA PRO's reimagined globe shape and more powerful motor mean one thing: more mind-blowing tricks than ever. Flex your skills with these advanced stunts and maneuvers that will push your creativity and test your accuracy - with or without the magic controller. Perfect for kids, teenagers, adults, Elderly. These mini flying drones make awesome travel toys, Christmas gifts, boys gifts, girls gifts and fun birthday party activities.

Specifications:

Size: 9.5 *9.5 *9.5cm

Net weight: 27g

Function: Air Suspension, Magic Controller, Sudden Acceleration, Magnets Adsorption

Color: Red/Blue/Pink

Aerodynamic Design: Spherical Design

Package Included:

1 x Flying Spinner

1 x instructions

1 x USB cable

1 x Packing box
product.highlights:
With three dazzling colored lights, your flying ball toy will look like a neon shooting star when you launch it across the sky.
It's easy to get started with the ball toy. Turn on the power button and hold the toy upwards, then simply shake to start and give it a toss!
Launches your toy, then call it right back to home base - that is your hand - with The Boomerang. Toss the spining toy into the air, and watch as it circles right back to you. Catch it in one hand and be ready to launch your next trick.
The toy ball can spin ultra-fast while hovering in place. Put your hand underneath the ball and follow the spining orb as long as you can, for the feeling that you're redefining gravity. Who said magic wasn't real?
Go freestyle as you hover, glide, and pass the toy ball and forths. Make things even more interesting by spicing up your catches and passes with different moves.

brand.name: NUBILUBI
brand.suggestion: More Baby & Toddler Toys  from NUBILUBI

product.desc:
Portable



The toy's lightweight and compact size make it easy to carry around, perfect for travel or as a car accessory.






Educational Toy



It serves as an educational toy, helping infants learn and speak while they play, making it an ideal early education companion.






Interactive Design



This toy features an interactive design that encourages babies to engage and play, promoting early language development.






Safety Material



Made from safe and non-toxic materials, this toy ensures the safety of your baby while they play and learn.






Aesthetic Appeal



With its cute bird design, the toy is not only functional but also visually appealing, capturing the attention of young children.

title: Children Boomerang Soft Three-leaf Cross Outdoor Toy Flying Disc Adult-kids Interactive Sports Toy for Puzzle Decompression Gift
detail_text: Color random Shipment The picture may cause some color difference due to different light and display configuration. Perfect Flight Path: Experience the thrill of a perfect flight path with our innovative boomerang made of safe and rigid foam material. Throw with ease and watch it soar. Colorful and Vibrant: Stand out from the crowd with our boomerang's vibrant colors and eye-catching design. Add a splash of excitement to your outdoor adventures. Durable and Reliable: Crafted with a top-notch quality foam composite material, our 9x9-inch boomerang withstands the test of time. It maintains its shape even after intense throws & water exposure. Easy and Safe for All Ages: Designed to be user-friendly and safe for kids and adults alike, our boomerang doesn't require a powerful throw. Everyone can enjoy the excitement without any worries. Outdoor Bonding: Strengthen family bonds and create lasting memories with our boomerang. Take it to the park, beach, or backyard for fun-filled outdoor bonding experiences.
